translations.es: Mi reputación importa en el trabajo.
translations.de: Mein Ruf ist bei der Arbeit wichtig.
translations.it: La mia reputazione conta sul lavoro.
translations.zh-Hans: 我的声誉在工作中很重要。
translations.yue: 我喺公司嘅名聲好重要。
translations.vi: Danh tiếng của tôi quan trọng ở nơi làm việc.
translations.nl: Mijn reputatie is op het werk belangrijk.
translations.hi: काम पर मेरी प्रतिष्ठा मायने रखती है.
translations.pl: Moja reputacja ma znaczenie w pracy.
translations.el: Η φήμη μου έχει σημασία στη δουλειά.
translations.nb: Mitt rykte betyr noe på jobben.
translations.id: Reputasi saya penting di tempat kerja.
translations.sv: Mitt rykte är viktigt på jobbet.
translations.cs: Na mé pověsti v práci záleží.
translations.da: Mit omdømme er vigtigt på arbejdet.
translations.ja: 職場では私の評判が大切です。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner, feminine singular, marks 1st person singular possessor and agrees with ‘réputation’.
Feminine singular noun; subject of the verb ‘compte’.
3rd person singular, present indicative; main verb, agrees with ‘réputation’.
Fused form of ‘à + le’; introduces the locative/contextual prepositional phrase ‘au travail’.
Masculine singular noun; complement of the preposition ‘à’ (via the fused form ‘au’).

sentences.target: Ta réputation souffre après ces messages.

translations.fr: Ta réputation souffre après ces messages.
translations.en: Your reputation suffers after those messages.
translations.es: Tu reputación sufre después de esos mensajes.
translations.de: Dein Ruf leidet nach diesen Nachrichten.
translations.it: La tua reputazione ne risente dopo quei messaggi.
translations.ko: 그 메시지들 이후에 네 평판이 나빠졌어.
translations.zh-Hans: 发了那些消息之后，你的声誉受损了。
translations.yue: 出咗嗰啲訊息之後，你嘅名聲受損咗。
translations.ru: После тех сообщений твоя репутация пострадала.
translations.pt: Sua reputação ficou abalada depois daquelas mensagens.
translations.he: אחרי ההודעות האלה, המוניטין שלך נפגע.
translations.tr: O mesajlardan sonra itibarın zarar gördü.
translations.vi: Sau những tin nhắn đó, danh tiếng của bạn bị ảnh hưởng.
translations.nl: Na die berichten heeft je reputatie geleden.
translations.uk: Після тих повідомлень твоя репутація постраждала.
translations.hu: Azok az üzenetek után a hírneved megromlott.
translations.hi: उन संदेशों के बाद तुम्हारी प्रतिष्ठा प्रभावित हुई.
translations.pl: Po tamtych wiadomościach twoja reputacja ucierpiała.
translations.el: Μετά από εκείνα τα μηνύματα, η φήμη σου επλήγη.
translations.nb: Etter de meldingene fikk ryktet ditt en knekk.
translations.sv: Efter de där meddelandena tog ditt rykte skada.
translations.ro: După acele mesaje, reputația ta a avut de suferit.
translations.cs: Po těch zprávách utrpěla tvoje pověst.
translations.da: Efter de beskeder tog dit omdømme skade.
translations.ja: あのメッセージの後で、あなたの評判は損なわれました。

tokens.explanation: 2nd person singular possessive determiner, feminine singular, modifying ‘réputation’.
Feminine singular noun; subject of ‘souffre’.
3rd person singular, present indicative; main verb expressing the adverse effect on the subject.
Preposition introducing a temporal complement.
Demonstrative determiner, plural; modifies ‘messages’.
Masculine plural noun; object/complement of the preposition ‘après’.

sentences.target: On protège notre réputation en ligne.

translations.fr: On protège notre réputation en ligne.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在网上保护我们的声誉。
translations.yue: 我哋喺網上保護我哋嘅名聲。
translations.ru: Мы защищаем нашу репутацию в интернете.
translations.he: אנחנו מגנים על המוניטין שלנו ברשת.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi bảo vệ danh tiếng của mình trên mạng.
translations.hi: हम ऑनलाइन अपनी प्रतिष्ठा की रक्षा करते हैं.
translations.el: Προστατεύουμε τη φήμη μας στο διαδίκτυο.
translations.nb: Vi beskytter omdømmet vårt på nett.
translations.id: Kami melindungi reputasi kami secara online.
translations.sv: Vi skyddar vårt rykte på nätet.
translations.ja: 私たちはオンラインで自分たちの評判を守ります。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite personal pronoun used as the subject; typically translates as ‘we’ in informal usage; grammatically 3rd person singular.
3rd person singular, present indicative; main verb; agrees with ‘On’.
1st person plural possessive determiner; modifies ‘réputation’.
Feminine singular noun; direct object of ‘protège’.
Preposition introducing the adverbial complement ‘en ligne’.
Noun forming the fixed expression ‘en ligne’ (‘online’); complement of ‘en’.

translations.es: Ese rumor daña la reputación de ella.
translations.it: Quella voce danneggia la sua reputazione.
translations.zh-Hans: 那个谣言损害她的声誉。
translations.yue: 嗰個謠言損害咗佢嘅名聲。
translations.pt: Aquele boato prejudica a reputação dela.
translations.tr: O söylenti onun itibarına zarar veriyor.
translations.vi: Tin đồn đó làm tổn hại danh tiếng của cô ấy.
translations.hu: Az a pletyka rontja az ő hírnevét.
translations.hi: वह अफवाह उसकी प्रतिष्ठा को नुकसान पहुँचाती है.
translations.el: Αυτή η φήμη βλάπτει την υπόληψή της.
translations.sv: Det där ryktet skadar hennes anseende.
translations.ja: その噂は彼女の評判を傷つけます。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative determiner, feminine singular; modifies ‘rumeur’.
Feminine singular noun; subject of ‘abîme’.
3rd person singular, present indicative; main verb expressing a detrimental action.
3rd person singular possessive determiner, feminine singular; modifies ‘réputation’.
Feminine singular noun; direct object of ‘abîme’.

On protège notre réputation en ligne.

On protège notre réputation en ligne.
en: Your reputation suffers after those messages.
